Hytoko 2025-11-08 8:09 PM
Center image should be a picture of John (and or Jane) with a few specific things surrounding it:
  • an image of Robloxia HQ (Sticky note or red pen saying “If only I hadn’t been so careless…”
  • a picture of a destroyed house, one taken not long before John gets taken (red point light effect indicating the spectre is close probably?)
  • images of John’s infection growing (can most likely use M1 arm as a showcase of this as that one is cannon)
  • An image of Builderman (Jane stating how he can never figure out)
  • Shedletsky with several question marks surrounding him
  • an image of Noli with burning buildings around him (Jane having wrote down if he had something to do with the infection)

Hytoko 2025-11-08 8:09 PM

 (edited)
Hytoko
Center image should be a picture of John (and or Jane) with a few specific things surrounding it:
  • an image of Robloxia HQ (Sticky note or red pen saying “If only I hadn’t been so careless…”
  • a picture of a destroyed house, one taken not long before John gets taken (red point light effect indicating the spectre is close probably?)
  • images of John’s infection growing (can most likely use M1 arm as a showcase of this as that one is cannon)
  • An image of Builderman (Jane stating how he can never figure out)
  • Shedletsky with several question marks surrounding him
  • an image of Noli with burning buildings around him (Jane having wrote down if he had something to do with the infection)

Yuyu [Inactive] 2025-11-26 6:47 PM
i would appreciate ideas for the renders yes yes
6:47 PM
Hytoko 2025-11-26 6:55 PM
Milestone 1: The Void Star at its brightest. Noli rotting against a wall that’s dark and dank. Alone with very little light shining through. Milestone 2: Noli putting himself together, lurking in the shadows of an alley as he watches Robloxians. Concealing the star. He misses the spotlight. Milestone 3: Noli performing on a stage, a crowd surrounding him as he performs tricks and admin abuse. Causing destruction all around him. Milestone 4: Robloxia in shambles. The admins surrounding Noli as each of them wield panels in order to combat him. Laughter filling the scene as the supernova he wields distorts and breaks things around it. A showman performing on his largest stage to date. (edited)
6:56 PM
@Yuyu [Inactive]
Hytoko
Milestone 1: The Void Star at its brightest. Noli rotting against a wall that’s dark and dank. Alone with very little light shining through. Milestone 2: Noli putting himself together, lurking in the shadows of an alley as he watches Robloxians. Concealing the star. He misses the spotlight. Milestone 3: Noli performing on a stage, a crowd surrounding him as he performs tricks and admin abuse. Causing destruction all around him. Milestone 4: Robloxia in shambles. The admins surrounding Noli as each of them wield panels in order to combat him. Laughter filling the scene as the supernova he wields distorts and breaks things around it. -> All of the VIP granted items (killers, skins) Killers: c00lkidd: Cultist c00lkidd, sch00lkidd, Whimsical, Dapper, p00lkidd, p4j4m4k1dd -# -> Outdated Models John Doe: All-Star, Pedro.EXE -# -> Outdated Models 1x1x1x1: Jack Frost, Green Envy, Infernum, Pride -# -> Jack Frost: Misleading render, render is shown completely blue but is red in-game -# -> Infernum: Overall dark render and hard to see -# -> Pride: Awkward render quality Survivors: Shedletsky: Whales, Fire Ninja, Knight, Rockin'/Ness, Y2K, Telamon -# -> Whales; Outdated rig -# -> Fire Ninja: Outdated rig (In-game has a hood, render has no hood) -# -> Knight: Misleading (Unique sword when it doesn't use that) -# -> Rockin'/Ness: Outdated rig (Different cap + bat) -# -> Y2k: Misleading (Render has grey hair, while actual skin has the normal hair) -# -> Telamon: Outdated rig (Eyes are visible in render, while they're covered in-game) Noob: Inverted, Cadi, Worker, Subject_1, Scene, Nooby, Combat Dummy -# -> Inverted: Incorrect/Outdated face -# -> Cadi: Wrong body-package -# -> Worker: Incorrect/Outdated face -# -> Subject_1: Incorrect/Outdated face -# -> Scene: Outdated hair mesh/texture -# -> Nooby: Outdated torso texture -# -> Combat Dummy: Incorrect/Outdated face Elliot: Base render, Usher, Scenecore Milkman, Supplier, Cake, Barista, Uni, Bandit, Casual, Manager, Baker, Treehugger, Picnic date, Jordan, Sally, Supermarket, Series, Ellioto Spaghetti -# -> Outdated skin tones, update can be considered Builderman: Construction Worker, Fixer Upper, Party, OBC, Retro, Oh Noes -# -> Construction Worker: Outdated hat -# -> Fixer Upper: Outdated body package -# -> Party: Severely old and outdated render -# -> OBC: Outdated rig -# -> Retro: Wrong body package -# -> Oh Noes: Wrong body package Guest 1337: Milestone III, Ultrakill, Classic, Steampunk, Little Brother, Bombo -# -> Milestone III: Lower resolution than the others -# -> Ultrakill: Outdated rig (no eye cover) -# -> Classic: Outdated body colour -# -> Steampunk: Outdated rig -# -> Little Brother: Outdated rig -# -> Bombo: Outdated textures -# (Girl and Boy Guest 1337 can be considered for an update due to quality) Taph: Spacelord, Inaba, Deep Winter, Y2K, The Dark Reaper, Nevermoor, Gratimeo, ZeekytheHbombTaph -# All (excluding Gratimeo & Zeeky) have outdated body meshes -# -> Gratimeo: Wrong body package (uses smooth and not retro) -# -> ZeekytheHbombTaph: Outdated Rig Chance: Isaac, Sinister Stalker, Pirate -# -> Isaac: Outdated rig (Clothing, no plushie, gloves) -# -> Sinister Stalker: Too red (filter may be misleading; also general eyesore) -# -> Pirate: Wrong hand blud! (Literally just gonna flip the render later lol) Dusekkar: 2009, FliesOfTheLord, Doothekkar, Butler -# -> 2009: Outdated VFX -# -> FliesOfTheLord: Low quality (Wtf was my posing) -# -> Doothekkar: Low quality (Skin blends in with background) -# -> Butler: Low quality (Lighting) 007n7: Milestone Renders (I, II, III, IV) -# -> Low quality + outdated Two Time: Snake, Weeping, Fancy, Phoenix, Prince, Princess, Spiral, Silverthorn -# -> Snake: Outdated rig (Beard and hair) -# -> Weeping: Outdated rig (Literally everything) -# -> Fancy: Outdated rig (Clothing) -# -> Phoenix: Outdated rig (Texture, and overall render sucks) -# -> Prince: Render could be better (Will be a paired render with Princess) -# -> Princess: Render could be better (Will be a paired render with Prince) -# -> Spiral: Render could be better/is misleading (Second life is only shown; render can show both lifes) -# -> Silverthorn: Render could be better (Blurry and dark) (edited)
